mnemonics.title: Mechanism vs Policy
mnemonics.content: Think 'Mechanism = Machine (HOW it works), Policy = Plan (WHAT to do)'. The machine (mechanism) stays the same; you change the plan (policy) as needed.

mnemonics.title: User Goals: CRSF
mnemonics.content: Remember 'CRSF' (like CSRF in web security) for User Goals: C = Convenient, R = Reliable, S = Safe, F = Fast.

mnemonics.title: Why C over Assembly: DUMP
mnemonics.content: Remember 'DUMP' for advantages of C: D = Debuggable, U = Understandable (readable), M = Maintainable, P = Portable.
